title: Entry-Level Instructional Designer at NIIT Consulting Pvt Ltd

jsonLd.title: Entry-Level Instructional Designer at NIIT Consulting Pvt Ltd
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Instructional Designer looking for your next big career move? NIIT Consulting Pvt Ltd in Nashik offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About NIIT Consulting Pvt Ltd:
NIIT Consulting Pvt Ltd is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Maintain classroom discipline and create a positive learning environment
• Contribute to school newsletter, blogs, and other publications
• Conduct parent-teacher meetings and update parents on student performance
• Utilize technology and digital tools to enhance learning outcomes
• Coordinate with academic counselors for student career guidance
• Monitor student progress and provide timely feedback
• Create curriculum-aligned learning materials and assessments

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBA from a recognized university
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Classroom Management
• Proficiency in Student Assessment
• Proficiency in Special Education
• Proficiency in Curriculum Development
• Proficiency in Lesson Planning
• Proficiency in Pedagogy
• Proficiency in CBSE/ICSE Standards
• Proficiency in Mentoring

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Professional development and training programs
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Nashik, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with NIIT Consulting Pvt Ltd!
